keys.general.language.description: Default primary locale for localized fields during entity creation. "System" uses the current interface language.
keys.general.codenameStyle.description: Naming convention for entity codenames throughout the metahub
keys.general.codenameAllowMixedAlphabets.desc: Allow mixing Latin and Cyrillic characters within a single codename (only for English+Russian alphabet)
keys.general.codenameAutoConvertMixedAlphabet: When mixed alphabets are disallowed, auto-convert mixed values to one alphabet by the first letter during auto-generation from name and during manual codename input on field blur
keys.general.codenameAutoReformat.description: Automatically convert codenames in the old format when editing or copying entities
keys.general.codenameRequireReformat.descript: Block saving until the codename is updated to the current format (only when auto-reformat is disabled)
keys.general.codenameLocalizedEnabled.descrip: Allow entering codename alternatives per language and selecting the primary codename locale
keys.hubs.allowCopy.description: Allow copying hubs within this metahub
keys.hubs.allowDelete.description: Allow deleting hubs from this metahub
keys.hubs.allowNesting.description: Allow parent-child hub relations and creating child hubs inside hubs.
keys.hubs.resetNestingOnce.description: One-time action: after saving, removes all parent-child relations between hubs and resets back to Off.
keys.hubs.allowAttachExistingEntities.descrip: Allow using the Add action in hub-scoped tabs to link already created entities to the current hub.
keys.catalogs.allowCopy.description: Allow copying catalogs within this metahub
keys.catalogs.allowDelete.description: Allow deleting catalogs from this metahub
keys.catalogs.attributeCodenameScope.descript: Whether attribute codenames must be unique per nesting level or globally within a catalog
keys.catalogs.allowedAttributeTypes.descripti: Which attribute data types can be used when creating attributes in catalogs
keys.catalogs.allowDeleteLastDisplayAttribute: Allow deleting the last display attribute in a scope (root attributes or table children)
keys.catalogs.allowAttributeMoveBetweenRootAn: Allow Attribute Move Between Root and Children
Allow moving attributes between root list and child lists of TABLE attributes
keys.catalogs.allowAttributeMoveBetweenChildL: Allow Attribute Move Between Child Lists
Allow moving attributes between child lists of different TABLE attributes
keys.catalogs.allowElementCopy.description: Allow copying predefined elements in catalogs
keys.catalogs.allowElementDelete.description: Allow deleting predefined elements in catalogs
keys.sets.allowCopy.description: Allow copying sets within this metahub
keys.sets.allowDelete.description: Allow deleting sets from this metahub
keys.sets.constantCodenameScope.description: Whether constant codenames must be unique per nesting level or globally within a set
keys.sets.allowedConstantTypes.description: Which data types can be used when creating constants in sets
keys.enumerations.allowCopy.description: Allow copying enumerations within this metahub
keys.enumerations.allowDelete.description: Allow deleting enumerations from this metahub

attributeCodenameScopes.per-level: Per nesting level (separate for root and each table attribute)
attributeCodenameScopes.global: Global (unique across all attributes in catalog)
